proof:
constructor
  · intro f hf n
    have f1 : f 1 = 1 := by
      have h := hf 1 1
      simp [Bonza] at h
      have : (f 1 : ℤ) ∣ 1 - (f 1 : ℤ) ^ (f 1 : ℕ) := h
      have : (f 1 : ℤ) ∣ (f 1 : ℤ) ^ (f 1 : ℕ) := dvd_pow_self (f 1 : ℤ) (f 1).ne_zero
      have h_one : (f 1 : ℤ) ∣ 1 := (dvd_add_iff_left this).mpr h
      exact PNat.coe_inj.mp (Int.eq_one_of_dvd_one (PNat.pos _) h_one)
    have fn_dvd_nn : ∀ n : ℕ+, (f n : ℤ) ∣ (n : ℤ) ^ (n : ℕ) := fun n => by
      have h := hf n n
      simp [Bonza] at h
      have : (f n : ℤ) ∣ (f n : ℤ) ^ (f n : ℕ) := dvd_pow_self (f n : ℤ) (f n).ne_zero
      exact (dvd_add_iff_left this).mpr h
    sorry
  · intro c hc
    sorry
